title: Leetcode Pattern Recognition Guide
description: Identify recurring patterns in Leetcode problems — sliding window, two pointers, BFS/DFS, dynamic programming, and more.

description: Build two complete interpreters from scratch — a tree-walk interpreter in Java and a bytecode VM in C. By Robert Nystrom.

description: The legendary MIT textbook (SICP) — abstraction, recursion, higher-order functions, interpreters, and metalinguistic abstraction. By Abelson & Sussman.

title: Guide_To_Clear_Java_Developer_Interview_-_Contains_250_Java_Spring-Boot_Microservice_Interview_Questions
description: 250 interview questions covering Java core, Spring Boot, microservices, REST APIs, and system design.

description: Beginner-friendly Java guide using visual learning — OOP, threading, networking, GUI with Swing, and collections.

description: Free CS1-level textbook — variables, control flow, arrays, OOP, recursion, linked lists, and GUI programming.

description: Comprehensive Java textbook by Deitel & Deitel — OOP, generics, collections, JDBC, multithreading, networking.

description: Gentle introduction to the Spring ecosystem — IoC, DI, Spring Boot, REST APIs, data persistence, and security.

title: Teach Yourself Java in 21 days
description: Day-by-day structured Java learning path — from Hello World to applets, networking, and multithreading.

title: TroubleShooting Java, 2th edition
description: Practical guide for debugging Java apps — thread dumps, heap analysis, memory leaks, slow queries, and production issues.

title: Eloquent JavaScript

description: The definitive CS:APP textbook — data representation, assembly, memory hierarchy, caching, virtual memory, concurrency. By Bryant & O'Hallaron.

title: Operating Systems - Three Easy Pieces
description: OSTEP — virtualization (CPU, memory), concurrency (threads, locks), and persistence (file systems, I/O). Free and widely used.

title: Database Internals
description: How databases work under the hood — B-Trees, LSM-Trees, storage engines, replication, consensus algorithms. By Alex Petrov.

title: SQL Performance Explained
description: Master SQL indexing and query optimization — how indexes work, EXPLAIN plans, join strategies, pagination. By Markus Winand.

title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner Slides v42
description: AWS Cloud Practitioner exam prep — core AWS services (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda), billing, shared responsibility model.

title: DevOps Roadmap Ebook 2025
description: 2025 DevOps learning roadmap — Linux, Git, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, monitoring, cloud platforms.

title: Game Programming Patterns
description: Design patterns applied to game development — game loop, update method, component, observer, command, flyweight. By Robert Nystrom.

title: A Philosophy of Software Design
description: Fight complexity with deep modules, information hiding, and strategic programming. By John Ousterhout (Stanford).

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: The DDIA bible — data models, storage engines, replication, partitioning, transactions, batch/stream processing. By Martin Kleppmann.

title: Kiến trúc ứng dụng web
description: Tài liệu tiếng Việt về kiến trúc ứng dụng web — MVC, microservices, API gateway, load balancing, caching.
